features.title: Email Dashboard
features.description: Full job tracking for all form submissions. Data table with tab filtering by type (All, Contact, Quotation, Service), status pipeline, correspondence threads, activity timeline, inline branded replies, team assignment, and bulk operations.

features.title: Testing & Ops Guide
features.description: Step-by-step operational procedures for testing the request pipeline end-to-end. Covers dev mode, email delivery verification, and troubleshooting common issues.
